courseTitle: Multiplayer, Networked Play, and Live Operations
title: Moderation and Safety Game
genericDescription: Anticipate harmful behavior; design reporting, muting, consent, and community constraints; make safety tools usable.
specificDescription: Build a social or multiplayer-adjacent prototype with at least four safety features such as mute, block, report, vote-kick, private lobby, consent gates, or filtered chat simulation.
gradingRubric: 30 pts safety design; 20 pts usability; 20 pts relevance to game context; 15 pts abuse-case analysis; 15 pts reflection.
